title: Dense, Nutty Shandong Polish Kabanos Steamed Congee
description: A rich and comforting congee made with Polish kabanos sausage, featuring a balance of nutty flavors and velvety texture, inspired by the Shandong cuisine.
instructions: Rinse the rice in a fine mesh strainer and drain well.
In a large pot, combine the rice, rendered pork fat, scallions, ginger, salt, and black pepper.
Add the water to the pot and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Use a spoon to break up any clumps and stir the congee.
Add the kabanos sausage to the pot and stir to combine.
Continue to simmer, covered, for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve the congee in a copper mug, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
